creator: ender@enderzone.com
text:
The file qemu-snapshot-2006-12-25_05.tar.bz2 is no longer hosted at 

http://qemu-forum.ipi.fi/qemu-snapshots/
http://people.fruitsalad.org/nox/qemu/
http://www.volny.cz/xnavara/qemu/
or 
ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/qemu/

Unfortunately I was unable to find the file anywhere on google. This means anyone that updates their ports collection and trys to install qemu will fail.

Fix: 

upload qemu-snapshot-2006-12-25_05.tar.bz2 to 
ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/qemu/
How-To-Repeat: Update ports collection.
cd /usr/ports/emulators/qemu
make install clean
